seoTitle: Goomarin vs Gorge Rock — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goomarin and Gorge Rock. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Goomarin vs Gorge Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goomarin and Gorge Rock.
heading: Goomarin vs Gorge Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goomarin, Western Australia and Gorge Rock, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gorge Rock has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Goomarin (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goomarin or Gorge Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goomarin has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Gorge Rock scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goomarin scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Gorge Rock scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goomarin or Gorge Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gorge Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
